title: Miramar Entertainment Park
summary:
Miramar Entertainment Park (Chinese: 美麗華百樂園; pinyin: Měilìhuá Bǎilèyuán) is a shopping mall located in the Dazhi area in Zhongshan District of Taipei, Taiwan.
The shopping mall contains an IMAX theater. With 28m × 21m dimensions, its movie screen is the largest in Asia for screening commercial films.
text:
Miramar Entertainment Park (Chinese: 美麗華百樂園; pinyin: Měilìhuá Bǎilèyuán) is a shopping mall located in the Dazhi area in Zhongshan District of Taipei, Taiwan.
The shopping mall contains an IMAX theater. With 28m × 21m dimensions, its movie screen is the largest in Asia for screening commercial films.

Ferris wheel
On the roof of Miramar Entertainment Park is a 70 meters (230 ft) tall ferris wheel, third tallest in Taiwan after the 88 meters (289 ft) Sky Wheel at Janfusun Fancyworld and Sky Dream in Lihpao Land. The building and wheel combined have a total overall height of 100 meters (330 ft), making it previously the highest overall in Taiwan, but now superseded by the Dream Mall ferris wheel (Kaohsiung Eye) in Kaohsiung, a smaller 50 meters (160 ft) diameter wheel on a taller building which opened in May 2007.

Transportation
The Wenhu line of the Taipei Metro has a station next to the mall.
